mapper.insert: insert into stu_selection(student_id, course_id, semester_id, week_day, class_id, status, assigned, create_time) values (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{semesterId}, #{weekDay}, #{classId}, coalesce(#{status}, 1), coalesce(#{assigned}, 0), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: select count(*) from stu_selection where student_id = #{studentId} and semester_id = #{semesterId} and week_day = #{weekDay} and status = 1
select count(*) from stu_selection where student_id = #{studentId} and course_id = #{courseId} and status = 1

select s.id, s.course_id, s.week_day, s.class_id, s.semester_id, s.create_time, coalesce(s.assigned, 0) as assigned, c.course_name, c.teacher_name, c.location, cl.class_name from stu_selection s join cou_course c on s.course_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' left join sys_class cl on s.class_id = cl.id where s.student_id = #{studentId} and s.semester_id = #{semesterId} and s.status = 1 order by s.week_day asc, s.id asc
select id, student_id, course_id, semester_id, week_day, class_id, status, assigned, create_time from stu_selection where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update stu_selection set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from stu_selection where semester_id = #{semesterId} and status = 1

select to_char(s.create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as date_str, count(*) as cnt from stu_selection s where s.semester_id = #{semesterId} and s.status = 1 and s.create_time >= CURRENT_DATE - (#{days} - 1) group by to_char(s.create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') order by date_str asc

select i.real_name as student_name, c.course_name, case s.week_day when 1 then '周一' when 2 then '周二' when 3 then '周三' when 4 then '周四' when 5 then '周五' else '' end as week_day_name, s.create_time from stu_selection s join stu_student_info i on s.student_id = i.user_id and i.del_flag = '0' join cou_course c on s.course_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' where s.semester_id = #{semesterId} and s.status = 1 order by s.create_time desc limit #{limit}
select s.week_day as week_day, count(*) as cnt from stu_selection s where s.semester_id = #{semesterId} and s.status = 1 group by s.week_day order by s.week_day asc
